title: tilia cordata var. ulmifolia
intro: Tilia cordata var. ulmifolia, also known as the small-leaved lime or small-leaved linden, is a variety of the Tilia cordata tree, a deciduous species native to Europe. The leaves and flowers of Tilia cordata var. ulmifolia possess medicinal properties, particularly as a calming and sedative agent, due to their high content of flavonoids and volatile oils. The plant has been used for centuries to treat various health issues, including anxiety, insomnia, and restlessness, thanks to its calming effects and ability to promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Tilia cordata var. ulmifolia, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, are commonly used to alleviate stress and promote a peaceful sleep.
